CVE-2025-5222.title: A stack buffer overflow was found in Internationl components for  ...
CVE-2025-5222.description: A stack buffer overflow was found in Internationl components for unicode (ICU ). While running the genrb binary, the 'subtag' struct overflowed at the SRBRoot::addTag function. This issue may lead to memory corruption and local arbitrary code execution.
